title: Simply Gems - Ruby
description: Add Ruby, Ore, Tools & Armor to your minecraft experience!
body:
![Brief Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23f3fbc7a633982652a53ed06ad1b9bfaebf8ef.png)

Adds Ruby Ore, Armor & Tools to your minecraft experience.
Found at -24 to 24 in two ore variants to match depth lower than 0.

Hardness: 9 Resistance: 18

5 new tools, 1 new armor set and 2 ruby ore variants.

1.01 Update coming: changes will include, proper tools settings to pickaxe to get drop, sword damage. 1.01 released, applying fix to proper tool to destroy the ore. updated sword damage to 7.
